description: Interior organizers selected for load capacity, smooth operation, and usable-space gains.

attributes.label: Cabinet Width
attributes.explanation: Organizer width must match opening and hinge intrusion.

attributes.label: Weight Capacity
attributes.explanation: Heavy cookware and pantry items require robust slide ratings.

attributes.label: Extension Type
attributes.explanation: Full-extension provides complete access to rear contents.

attributes.label: Soft Close
attributes.explanation: Soft-close reduces wear and improves user experience.

attributes.label: Material
attributes.explanation: Steel frames and quality plywood trays outlast light wire assemblies.

watch_out_factors.title: Hinge and Face-Frame Interference
watch_out_factors.description: Organizer travel can be blocked by door hinges or narrow openings.

watch_out_factors.title: Under-Sink Obstructions
watch_out_factors.description: Plumbing and disposal placement can reduce usable pull-out depth.

buyer_guide_key_points: Verify load rating for intended items.
Soft-close full-extension hardware pays off long term.
contractor_questions: Can this organizer clear existing hinges and trim?
Will plumbing relocation be required for under-sink units?
